Toast.description: Toast messages should use 'successfully' and end with period

Success Toast.description: Success toasts should use past participle + successfully, with period

Error Toast.description: Error messages should end with period

past_participle_successfully.name: Past Participle + Successfully
past_participle_successfully.description: Action verbs before 'Successfully' must be in -ed form

period_not_exclamation.name: Use Period, Not Exclamation
period_not_exclamation.description: Toast messages should end with period (.) not exclamation (!)
